{{CargoRelic
|name=Mutant Enoki
|class_id=20236
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This Relic has a unique trait. It will never change no matter what happens to it! To some degree, it has reached immortality!
|fame=17
|art=12
|fth=30
|civ=14
|tech=17
|ss1=Per Unknown Creature needs met, Snail HP +20<br>Needs Met: 15/15
|ss2=Per Unknown Creature needs met, Snail HP +40<br>Needs Met: 15/15
|ss3=Per Unknown Creature needs met, Snail HP +60<br>Needs Met: 15/15
|ss4=Per Unknown Creature needs met, Snail HP +60<br>Needs Met: 15/15
|ss7=Per Unknown Creature needs met, Snail HP +60<br>Needs Met: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
